custom_css: Header .title-3d{font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:#fff!important;text-shadow:2px 2px 0 #e10600,4px 4px 0 #000!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;gap:10px!important;animation:vibration 0.1s infinite!important}header .title-3d::before{content:none!important}header button{background:#15151e!important;border:2px solid #e10600!important;border-radius:2px!important;color:#fff!important;position:relative;overflow:hidden}aside .btn-pulse,#main-fire-btn{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#e10600 0%,#ff1e1e 50%,#e10600 100%)!important;color:#fff!important;font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;border-radius:2px!important;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(225,6,0,0.6)!important;animation:super-speed 0.8s infinite linear!important;background-size:200% auto!important}@keyframes vibration{0%{transform:translate(0)}50%{transform:translate(1px, 1px)}100%{transform:translate(0)}}@keyframes super-speed{0%{background-position:0% 50%}100%{background-position:200% 50%}}#streak-input{background:#1a1a24!important;border:1px solid #333!important;border-left:5px solid #e10600!important;color:#fff!important}.tab-btn.active{color:#e10600!important;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(225,6,0,0.5)!important}.tab-btn.active::after{background:#e10600!important;height:4px!important;animation:race-line 0.5s forwards ease-out}@keyframes race-line{0%{width:0}100%{width:100%}}.item-card.selected-card{border:2px solid #e10600!important;box-shadow:inset 0 0 15px rgba(225,6,0,0.2)!important}
